flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Evergreen Valley College fell 29% between 2009 and 2010 (7.2% → 5.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Evergreen Valley College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($602 → $764).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Evergreen Valley College rose 24% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.1k → $5.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Evergreen Valley College fell 17% between 2007 and 2010 (24.5% → 20.3%).
